base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of badniks — a character (minion) from 1991 sonic the hedgehog. Badnik robot enemies — Motobug/Buzzbomber/Chopper/Newtron/Burrobot/Crabmeat/Caterkiller/Orbinaut/Bat Brain. Free captured animal when destroyed. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Badnik robot enemies — Motobug/Buzzbomber/Chopper/Newtron/Burrobot/Crabmeat/Caterkiller/Orbinaut/Bat Brain. Free captured animal when destroyed
